name: Calculadora de Descuento
desc: Calcula el precio final y el ahorro con un descuento porcentual.
description: Calcula el precio final y el ahorro con un descuento porcentual.
seo_description: Calcula cuánto pagas tras un descuento del X%. Introduce el precio original y el porcentaje de descuento. Calculadora facil de usar con desglose de.
example_label: Calculating final price and savings for a €189.95 item with 35% discount.
result_context: The precio_final of {precio_final} is what you pay after discount. The ahorro of {ahorro} shows how much you saved.
mistakes: Adding discount percentages when multiple discounts apply (should compound)
Calculating discount from wrong base price
Forgetting to check if discount applies to sale items
